ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "stock_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock exchange */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the industry sector */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the stock */,
  "dividend_yield" REAL /* Dividend yield of the stock */,
  "52_week_high" REAL /* 52-week high price of the stock */,
  "52_week_low" REAL /* 52-week low price of the stock */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the stock's headquarters */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stocks_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stocks_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("sector_id") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock price entry */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock the price belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the stock price */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock on that date */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock on that date */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock on that date */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock on that date */,
  "adj_close_price" REAL /* Adjusted closing price of the stock on that date */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume of the stock on that date */,
  "day_change" REAL /* Day change in stock price */,
  "percentage_change" REAL /* Percentage change in stock price */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock exchange */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the stock exchange */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* Time zone of the stock exchange */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the stock exchange */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sectors" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry sector */,
  "sector_name" TEXT /* Name of the industry sector */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the industry sector */,
  "parent_sector_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent sector */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sectors_parent_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_sector_id") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the user registered */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time of the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysis_tools" (
  "tool_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis tool */,
  "tool_name" TEXT /* Name of the analysis tool */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the analysis tool */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the analysis tool */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tool_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tool_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tool usage entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user using the tool */,
  "tool_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the analysis tool used */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the tool was used */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of tool usage in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tool_usage_tool_id FOREIGN KEY ("tool_id") REFERENCES analysis_tools ("tool_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tool_usage_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "headline" TEXT /* Headline of the news article */,
  "text" TEXT /* Text of the news article */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the news article was published */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock related to the news article */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the news article */,
  "impact" TEXT /* Estimated impact of the news on stock prices */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feeds" (
  "feed_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data feed */,
  "feed_name" TEXT /* Name of the data feed */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of data feed (e.g., real-time prices, historical data) */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the data feed */,
  "update_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of updates for the data feed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feed_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feed_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feed usage entry */,
  "feed_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data feed used */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the data feed was used */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the data feed usage (e.g., successful, failed) */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Error message if the feed usage failed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feed_usage_feed_id FOREIGN KEY ("feed_id") REFERENCES feeds ("feed_id")
)
